rationale: No profile was actually written. The response consists entirely of the model's internal planning notes—brainstorming, outlining, and a partially drafted thinking process. The task asked for a finished piece of nonfiction; nothing resembling a completed profile appears on the page. There is nothing to evaluate on any axis.
